diagrams.title: Erosion Operation Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows a binary image with a square object being eroded by a 3×3 square structuring element. The result shows the object shrunk by one pixel layer from all sides.
elements: Original binary image with square object
Eroded result - smaller square inside original
Boundary pixels removed (shown in different color)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how erosion shrinks objects by removing boundary pixels based on structuring element size

diagrams.title: Dilation Operation Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows a binary image with a square object being dilated by a 3×3 square structuring element. The result shows the object expanded by one pixel layer in all directions.
elements: Original binary image with square object
Dilated result - larger square containing original
Boundary pixels added (shown in different color)
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how dilation expands objects by adding boundary pixels based on structuring element size

diagrams.title: Structuring Element Types
diagrams.description: Common structuring element shapes used in morphological operations: (a) Square, (b) Disk, (c) Cross, (d) Line at various angles
elements: Origin point marked on each SE
diagrams.purpose: Show different SE shapes and their effects on detecting different types of features in images
